scripts.build-lambda: rm -rf lambda/dist && esbuild lambda/get-user-st-balance.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outdir=lambda/dist --external:aws-sdk && esbuild lambda/get-markets.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outdir=lambda/dist --external:aws-sdk && esbuild lambda/get-lava-vaults.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outdir=lambda/dist --external:aws-sdk && esbuild lambda/sync-lava-vaults.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outdir=lambda/dist --external:aws-sdk && esbuild lambda/upsert-token-metadata.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outdir=lambda/dist --external:aws-sdk && esbuild lambda/post-batch-orders.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outdir=lambda/dist --external:aws-sdk && esbuild lambda/auto-batch-orders.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outdir=lambda/dist --external:aws-sdk && esbuild lambda/get-batch-stats.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outdir=lambda/dist --external:aws-sdk && esbuild lambda/build-user-order-tx.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outdir=lambda/dist --external:aws-sdk && esbuild lambda/build-mint-test-tokens-tx.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outdir=lambda/dist --external:aws-sdk && esbuild lambda/get-user-orders.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outdir=lambda/dist --external:aws-sdk && esbuild lambda/build-cancel-order-tx.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outdir=lambda/dist --external:aws-sdk
scripts.deploy:my: AWS_PROFILE=default NODE_OPTIONS=--dns-result-order=ipv4first AWS_RETRY_MODE=adaptive AWS_MAX_ATTEMPTS=10 cdk deploy --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:company: AWS_PROFILE=company NODE_OPTIONS=--dns-result-order=ipv4first AWS_RETRY_MODE=adaptive AWS_MAX_ATTEMPTS=10 cdk deploy --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:company:mainnet: AWS_PROFILE=company NODE_OPTIONS=--dns-result-order=ipv4first AWS_RETRY_MODE=adaptive AWS_MAX_ATTEMPTS=10 cdk deploy LavaBackendCompanyMainnetStack --context target=company-mainnet --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:my:full: npm run build-lambda && npm run deploy:my
scripts.deploy:company:full: npm run build-lambda && npm run deploy:company
scripts.deploy:company:mainnet:full: npm run build-lambda && npm run deploy:company:mainnet
